title: NASA International Space Station
description: A NASA source card about the International Space Station, microgravity, research, and cooperation.
license: Public Domain / NASA Media Usage Guidelines

pages.text: NASA International Space Station resources explain orbital research, microgravity, astronaut life, technology demonstrations, and international collaboration.
Use this source for students connecting biology, physics, engineering, geography, and human systems through real research in orbit.
NASA materials are generally public domain as U.S. government work, but some images, partner resources, insignia, and logos have separate usage rules. Check item-level rights.
